name: NewHydrogen, Inc.
summary: NewHydrogen, Inc. is a clean energy technology developer focused on producing low-cost green hydrogen. The company is developing ThermoLoop™, a thermochemical water-splitting process that uses heat instead of electricity to produce green hydrogen. Working with a research team at UC Santa Barbara, the technology targets industrial temperature ranges below 1000°C, sourcing heat from concentrated solar, geothermal, nuclear, or industrial waste heat.

products.name: ThermoLoop™
products.description: A novel thermochemical water-splitting process using heat instead of electricity to produce low-cost green hydrogen via a continuous redox chemical looping process below 1000°C.

partnerships.description: World-class research team collaborating with NewHydrogen on the ThermoLoop™ thermochemical water-splitting technology.
